Purpose
The purpose of this site is to convey science to the community.
My email address for contact is: joseph.bulbulia@vuw.ac.nz

            I’m a professor of psychology in the Faculty of Science
            at Victoria University of Wellington. I work in the areas of
            cultural evolution, religion, longitudinal research,
            psychological distress, and the good life.
            The views expressed here are my own, and, where
            indicated, also of my collaborators.
            My email contact is: joseph.bulbulia@vuw.ac.nz
